title: Notaui OAuth Client Specification
summary: Implemented the Notaui OAuth client against the verified api.notaui.com production contract, including PKCE auth-code connect, backend client_secret_basic exchange, immediate account discovery, default-account persistence, Connectors UI enrichment, and account-aware MCP routing with X-Notaui-Account-ID for non-default accounts.
next_action: Deploy and verify the Notaui OAuth connect flow in production when requested.

verification.notes: `mix precommit` passed on 2026-03-12 after implementing the Notaui OAuth helper, callback-time account discovery, account-aware connector routing, Connectors UI updates, Notaui tool account selection, and a test bootstrap fix that forces the test environment to load the test consolidated Enumerable protocol table so LazyHTML-backed LiveView tests run correctly.

resume_context.last_completed_step: Implemented the Notaui OAuth/account discovery flow, verified account-aware MCP routing, and passed the full repo verification gate.
resume_context.notes: Scope stayed limited to the OAuth client and account context. The implementation preserves the app-level client_credentials path for nil user_id flows, while user-scoped requests now use refreshable Notaui OAuth grants plus discovered-account metadata.

history.note: Initial draft created for the production Notaui OAuth client and account-routing contract.
Implementation began against the approved OAuth-first Notaui spec.

Completed the Notaui OAuth client with api.notaui.com defaults, PKCE auth-code exchange, post-auth account discovery, default-account persistence, account-aware MCP routing, Connectors UI updates, and passing `mix precommit` verification.
